signature.imageEvidence: outdoor live-fire catering station with wood oven, prep table, finished pizza, tacos, toppings, and crew visible
signature.styleContract: Warm and lively with guest-count proof, an outdoor live-fire catering station, flame-yellow action accents, and a readable menu ticket as the signature move.

notes: Works: Frame catering around a live setup photo, menu samples, service footprint, guest-count notes, and date-check CTAs. should separate this from nearby patterns.
Proof: outdoor live-fire catering station with wood oven, prep table, finished pizza, tacos, toppings, and crew visible. carries the niche-specific read.
Watch: compare package-menu-board neighbors for hero geometry, CTA rhythm, and proof treatment.
Fix next: no mechanical visual-sweep failures; judge taste from first viewport screenshots.
